  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/rubygem-davclient Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  DavClient is a scriptable WebDAV command line client for Ruby
  for managing content on webservers that support the WebDAV extensions.
  
  WWW: http://davclient.rubyforge.org/
  
  PR:             ports/154126
  Submitted by:   Mikhail T. <michael at fun-box.ru>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2802    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/www/rubygem-davclient/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/www/rubygem-davclient/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/www/rubygem-davclient/pkg-descr (new)
